persona_id: string not null
platform: string not null
author_id: string not null
member_count: int64 not null
canonical_handle: string not null
canonical_display_name: string
confidence: double not null
resolution_version: string not null
evidence_json: string
activation_date: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
job_run_id: string not null
run_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
pipeline_version: string not null
schema_version: int64 not null
source_type: string not null
region: string
tenant_id: string
